Fields.Name: Force Scale Velocity Buffer
Fields.Description: Decrease the resolution of the velocity buffer used internally. Not effective if you are not using precision velocity buffers

Fields.Name: Cheap Filter Mode
Fields.Description: Normally processed by the Reconstruction filter, but downgraded to a lighter process

Fields.Name: Sample Count Bias
Fields.Description: Give an offset to the sample count * Set to a multiple of 2

Fields.Name: Recurrence Count Bias
Fields.Description: Give an offset to the number of recursive blurs

Fields.Name: Blur Max Length Scale
Fields.Description: Scale value for blur maximum length parameter
